title: Crypto Biz: Institutions tighten their grip on Bitcoin, AI and prediction markets

title: Bitcoin price falls under $77K as Dow Jones hits new all-time highs

briefing: Bitcoin headed lower as Wall Street trading began with new record highs for the Dow Jones, while traders warned of weak US demand.

title: NYSE owner ICE to launch oil-linked futures with OKX
summary: NYSE owner ICE to launch oil-linked futures with OKX
briefing: ICE and OKX plan to launch oil-linked perpetual futures based on Brent and WTI benchmarks, bringing crypto derivatives further into traditional energy markets under licensing restrictions.

title: Bitcoin miner MARA spent $4.3M on CEO security in 2025 as crypto attacks rise
summary: Bitcoin miner MARA spent $4.3M on CEO security in 2025 as crypto attacks rise
briefing: MARA spent $4.3 million on CEO Fred Thiel’s security in 2025, including vehicle armoring, as crypto wrench attacks increased globally.

summary: Polymarket Hit By ‘Internal Top-Up’ Wallet Exploit, $700K Drained
